   366→async def run_pipeline_default(
   367→    browser: BrowserManager,
   368→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   369→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   370→    location: Optional[str],
   371→    max_pages: int,
   372→    template: str,
   373→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   374→    dry_run: bool,
   375→    skip_messaged: bool,
   376→    interactive: bool = False,
   377→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   378→) -> None:
   379→    """Pipeline: search all pages first, then send messages.
   380→
   381→    Saves a checkpoint after search completes so that message sending
   382→    can be resumed if interrupted.
   383→    """
   384→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   385→
   386→    checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   387→
   388→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   389→        # Keep enterprise tab open for inline messaging (unless dry_run)
   390→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   391→            browser, keywords, company, max_pages,
   392→            keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   393→        )
   394→    else:
   395→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
   396→            browser, keywords, company, location, max_pages,
   397→        )
   398→
   399→    if not all_candidates:
   400→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   401→        return
   402→
   403→    # Save checkpoint after search (batch_pages=0 marks non-batch mode)
   404→    _save_checkpoint(
   405→        checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   406→        max_pages, 0, skip_messaged, interactive,
   407→        max_pages, [], seen_ids, {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0},
   408→        mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   409→    )
   410→
   411→    display_candidates_table(all_candidates, "Pipeline Results")
   412→
   413→    if dry_run:
   414→        console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] {len(all_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   415→        checkpoint.delete()
   416→        return
   417→
   418→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   419→        results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   420→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   421→        )
   422→    else:
   423→        results = await send_batch(
   424→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   425→        )
   426→    display_send_results(results)
   427→    generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, results, keywords, template, mode)
   428→
   429→    # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   430→    checkpoint.delete()
   431→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   432→
   433→
   434→async def run_pipeline_batched(
   435→    browser: BrowserManager,
   436→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   437→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   438→    location: Optional[str],
   439→    max_pages: int,
   440→    batch_pages: int,
   441→    template: str,
   442→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   443→    dry_run: bool,
   444→    skip_messaged: bool,
   445→    interactive: bool = False,
   446→    resume_ckpt=None,
   447→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   448→) -> None:
   449→    """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   450→    from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in, check_login_status
   451→    from src.core.session import get_session_manager
   452→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   453→
   454→    # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   455→    if resume_ckpt:
   456→        # On resume, only treat sent_ids as truly "seen" (skip-worthy).
   457→        # Candidates that were found but not sent should be retried.
   458→        sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   459→        seen_ids = set(sent_ids)  # only skip candidates already successfully sent
   460→        total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {
   461→            'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0,
   462→        }
   463→        start_from_page = resume_ckpt.completed_pages + 1
   464→        console.print(f"[cyan]Resuming from page {start_from_page} (sent: {len(sent_ids)}, retrying unsent)[/cyan]")
   465→        checkpoint = resume_ckpt
   466→    else:
   467→        seen_ids = set()
   468→        sent_ids = []
   469→        total_results = {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0}
   470→        start_from_page = 1
   471→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   472→
   473→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   474→    all_details: List[dict] = []
   475→    batch_num = 0
   476→    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   477→
   478→    batch_start = start_from_page
   479→    while batch_start <= max_pages:
   480→        batch_page_count = min(batch_pages, max_pages - batch_start + 1)
   481→        batch_num += 1
   482→        batch_end = batch_start + batch_page_count - 1
   483→
   484→        console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Batch {batch_num}: Pages {batch_start}-{batch_end} ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   485→
   486→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   487→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   488→                browser, keywords, company, batch_page_count,
   489→                keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   490→            )
   491→        else:
   492→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   493→                browser, keywords, company, location, batch_page_count, start_page=batch_start,
   494→            )
   495→        # Filter out globally seen IDs
   496→        batch_candidates = [c for c in batch_candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   497→        seen_ids.update(c.maimai_id for c in batch_candidates)
   498→        all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   499→
   500→        if not batch_candidates:
   501→            consecutive_empty_batches += 1
   502→            console.print(f"[yellow]No new candidates in batch {batch_num}.[/yellow]")
   503→
   504→            if consecutive_empty_batches >= 2:
   505→                console.print("[red]Multiple consecutive empty batches detected. Verifying login status...[/red]")
   506→                if not await check_login_status(browser.page):
   507→                    console.print("[red]Session expired! Clearing session and re-authenticating...[/red]")
   508→                    session_manager = get_session_manager()
   509→                    await session_manager.clear()
   510→                    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   511→                    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   512→                    console.print("[green]Re-authenticated. Retrying current batch...[/green]")
   513→                    batch_num -= 1
   514→                    continue
   515→                else:
   516→                    console.print("[yellow]Session appears valid. Possibly no more results for these keywords.[/yellow]")
   517→
   518→            _save_checkpoint(
   519→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   520→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   521→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   522→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   523→            )
   524→            batch_start += batch_pages
   525→            continue
   526→        else:
   527→            consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   528→
   529→        display_candidates_table(batch_candidates, f"Batch {batch_num} Results")
   530→
   531→        if dry_run:
   532→            console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] Batch {batch_num}: {len(batch_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   533→            _save_checkpoint(
   534→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   535→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   536→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   537→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   538→            )
   539→            batch_start += batch_pages
   540→            continue
   541→
   542→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   543→            results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   544→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   545→            )
   546→        else:
   547→            results = await send_batch(
   548→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   549→            )
   550→        display_send_results(results, title=f"Batch {batch_num} Send Results")
   551→
   552→        all_details.extend(results.get('details', []))
   553→        for detail in results.get('details', []):
   554→            if detail.get('status') == 'sent':
   555→                sent_ids.append(detail['maimai_id'])
   556→
   557→        for key in total_results:
   558→            total_results[key] += results[key]
   559→
   560→        _save_checkpoint(
   561→            checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   562→            max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   563→            batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   564→            mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   565→        )
   566→        console.print(f"[dim]Checkpoint saved (page {batch_end})[/dim]")
   567→
   568→        batch_start += batch_pages
   569→
   570→    # Final summary
   571→    console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Pipeline Complete ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   572→    console.print(f"Total unique candidates found: {len(seen_ids)}")
   573→    if not dry_run and total_results['total'] > 0:
   574→        display_send_results(total_results, title="Overall Send Results")
   575→        total_results_with_details = {**total_results, 'details': all_details}
   576→        generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, total_results_with_details, keywords, template, mode)
   577→
   578→    checkpoint.delete()
   579→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   580→
   581→
   582→def _save_checkpoint(
   583→    checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   584→    max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   585→    completed_pages, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   586→    mode: str = "search_center",
   587→    dry_run: bool = False,
   588→) -> None:
   589→    """Save pipeline checkpoint (DRY helper)."""
   590→    checkpoint.save(
   591→        keywords=keywords, template=template, variables=variables,
   592→        company=company, location=location, max_pages=max_pages,
   593→        batch_pages=batch_pages, skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   594→        interactive=interactive, completed_pages=completed_pages,
   595→        sent_ids=sent_ids, seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   596→        total_results=total_results, mode=mode, dry_run=dry_run,
   597→    )
   598→

1→"""Custom exceptions for Maimai Assistant."""

     3→
     4→class MaimaiAssistantError(Exception):
     5→    """Base exception for all Maimai Assistant errors."""
     6→    pass
     7→
     8→
     9→class BrowserError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    10→    """Raised when browser automation fails."""
    11→    pass
    12→
    13→
    14→class SessionExpiredError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    15→    """Raised when Maimai session has expired."""
    16→    pass
    17→
    18→
    19→class RateLimitExceededError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    20→    """Raised when rate limit is exceeded."""
    21→
    22→    def __init__(self, action_type: str, wait_time: int, message: str = None):
    23→        self.action_type = action_type
    24→        self.wait_time = wait_time
    25→        if message is None:
    26→            message = f"Rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. Wait {wait_time} seconds."
    27→        super().__init__(message)
    28→
    29→
    30→class SelectorNotFoundError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    31→    """Raised when page selector is not found."""
    32→    pass
    33→
    34→
    35→class ExtractionError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    36→    """Raised when data extraction fails."""
    37→    pass
    38→
    39→
    40→
    41→class ConfigurationError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    42→    """Raised when configuration is invalid."""
    43→    pass
    44→
    45→
    46→class ValidationError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    47→    """Raised when input validation fails."""
    48→    pass
    49→
    50→
    51→class PermanentFailureError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    52→    """Raised when a send failure is deterministic and should not be retried.
    53→
    54→    Examples: no profile URL, VIP paywall, candidate already messaged.
    55→    """
    56→    pass
    57→

    34→
    35→console = Console()
    36→
    37→# Maimai profile URL (fallback)
    38→MAIMAI_PROFILE_URL = "https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{maimai_id}"
    39→
    40→# Maimai chat URL - navigate directly to chat page
    41→MAIMAI_CHAT_URL = "https://maimai.cn/bizmember/uh_chat_pc?u2={user_id}&from=pc_web_search&fr=profile"
    42→
    43→
    44→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    45→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    46→
    47→    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    48→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    49→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    50→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    51→    """
    52→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    53→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    54→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    55→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    56→    for key in ('dstu', 'u2', 'egid'):
    57→        if key in params:
    58→            return params[key][0]
    59→    return None
    60→
    61→
    62→async def _navigate_to_chat(
    63→    page: Page,
    64→    profile_url: Optional[str],
    65→    config,
    66→    browser: BrowserManager,
    67→    maimai_id: str,
    68→    interactive: bool = False,
    69→    discovered_selectors=None,
    70→) -> bool:
    71→    """Navigate to the chat page for a candidate.
    72→
    73→    Tries in order:
    74→    1. Extract user_id from profile_url query params → direct chat URL
    75→    2. Navigate to profile_url, extract user_id from redirected URL → direct chat URL
    76→    3. Click chat button on profile page as fallback
    77→
    78→    If no profile_url is provided, looks up the candidate's profile_url from DB.
    79→
    80→    Args:
    81→        page: Playwright page instance
    82→        profile_url: Candidate's profile URL (may be None)
    83→        config: Config instance
    84→        browser: Browser manager instance
    85→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
    86→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery
    87→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance
    88→
    89→    Returns:
    90→        True if successfully navigated to chat page
    91→    """
    92→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    93→
    94→    # Resolve profile URL from DB if not provided
    95→    if not profile_url:
    96→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    97→            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
    98→            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None
    99→
   100→        if not profile_url:
   101→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"No profile URL for {maimai_id}")
   102→
   103→    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL
   104→    user_id = _extract_user_id(profile_url)
   105→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: profile_url={profile_url!r}, extracted user_id={user_id}")
   106→
   107→    if user_id:
   108→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)
   109→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   110→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   111→        return True
   112→
   113→    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   114→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   115→    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   116→    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   117→
   118→    current_url = page.url
   119→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: landed on {current_url}")
   120→    redirected_user_id = _extract_user_id(current_url)
   121→    if redirected_user_id:
   122→        logger.info(f"Extracted user_id={redirected_user_id} from page URL, redirecting to chat")
   123→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=redirected_user_id)
   124→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   125→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   126→        return True
   127→
   128→    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page
   129→    chat_button_found = await _click_chat_button(page, config)
   130→    if chat_button_found:
   131→        await async_random_delay('action')
   132→        return True
   133→
   134→    # If interactive mode, trigger selector discovery
   135→    if interactive and discovered_selectors is not None and not discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   136→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import discover_chat_page
   137→        console.print("[yellow]Chat button not found. Entering interactive discovery mode...[/yellow]")
   138→        result = await discover_chat_page(page, maimai_id, browser)
   139→        if result.is_populated:
   140→            discovered_selectors.chat_button = result.chat_button
   141→            discovered_selectors.message_input = result.message_input
   142→            discovered_selectors.send_button = result.send_button
   143→            discovered_selectors.chat_url_pattern = result.chat_url_pattern
   144→            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   145→            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True
   146→            return True
   147→
   148→    console.print("[red]Could not find chat button[/red]")
   149→    await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   150→    return False
   151→

   153→async def _handle_quick_contact(page: Page, content: str) -> Optional[bool]:
   154→    """Handle Maimai's "极速联系" (Quick Contact) page.
   155→
   156→    This page appears instead of regular chat for some candidates. It has a
   157→    category selector, a textarea, and a "提交" (Submit) button.
   158→
   159→    Args:
   160→        page: Playwright page instance
   161→        content: Message content to send
   162→
   163→    Returns:
   164→        True if message was sent via quick contact form,
   165→        False if quick contact page was detected but sending failed,
   166→        None if this is not a quick contact page (caller should continue normal flow)
   167→    """
   168→    try:
   169→        # Detect quick contact page via page title or page content
   170→        is_quick_contact = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   171→            const title = document.title || '';
   172→            const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   173→            return title.includes('极速联系') || bodyText.includes('极速联系');
   174→        }''')
   175→
   176→        if not is_quick_contact:
   177→            return None
   178→
   179→        logger.info("Detected '极速联系' (Quick Contact) page")
   180→
   181→        # Select "招聘类" category if present
   182→        try:
   183→            recruit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(
   184→                'text=招聘类', timeout=3000
   185→            )
   186→            if recruit_btn:
   187→                await human_click(page, 'text=招聘类')
   188→                await async_random_delay('action')
   189→                logger.debug("Selected '招聘类' category")
   190→        except Exception:
   191→            logger.debug("'招聘类' category button not found, continuing")
   192→
   193→        # Find textarea and fill with message content using Playwright native fill
   194→        try:
   195→            textarea = await page.wait_for_selector('textarea', timeout=5000)
   196→            if not textarea:
   197→                logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found")
   198→                return False
   199→        except Exception:
   200→            logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found (timeout)")
   201→            return False
   202→
   203→        # Clear and fill using Playwright's native API (avoids Emunium issues)
   204→        await textarea.click()
   205→        await textarea.fill('')
   206→        await textarea.fill(content)
   207→        await async_random_delay('action')
   208→        logger.debug("Filled quick contact textarea")
   209→
   210→        # Click "提交" (Submit) button — race all selectors in parallel via JS,
   211→        # then click the first visible match. Retries up to 2 times.
   212→        submit_selectors = [
   213→            'button:has-text("提交")',
   214→            ':has-text("提交"):not(body):not(div:has(div:has-text("提交")))',
   215→            'text=提交',
   216→            '[class*="submit"]',
   217→            '[class*="btn"]:has-text("提交")',
   218→            'a:has-text("提交")',
   219→            'div:has-text("提交"):not(:has(div:has-text("提交")))',
   220→        ]
   221→
   222→        max_submit_retries = 2
   223→        for submit_attempt in range(1 + max_submit_retries):
   224→            submit_btn = None
   225→            matched_selector = None
   226→
   227→            # Try selectors sequentially (Playwright page is not safe for concurrent ops)
   228→            for sel in submit_selectors:
   229→                try:
   230→                    elem = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=1500)
   231→                    if elem and await elem.is_visible():
   232→                        submit_btn = elem
   233→                        matched_selector = sel
   234→                        break
   235→                except Exception:
   236→                    continue
   237→
   238→            if submit_btn and matched_selector:
   239→                logger.debug(f"Quick contact: found submit button with selector: {matched_selector}")
   240→                break
   241→
   242→            if submit_attempt < max_submit_retries:
   243→                logger.debug(f"Quick contact: submit button not found, retry {submit_attempt + 1}")
   244→                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   245→
   246→        if not submit_btn or not matched_selector:
   247→            logger.warning("Quick contact: submit button not found with any selector after retries")
   248→            return False
   249→
   250→        try:
   251→            await submit_btn.click()
   252→        except Exception:
   253→            try:
   254→                await human_click(page, matched_selector)
   255→            except Exception as click_err:
   256→                logger.warning(f"Quick contact: both click methods failed: {click_err}")
   257→                return False
   258→        await async_random_delay('action')
   259→        logger.info("Quick contact: submitted message")
   260→        return True
   261→
   262→    except Exception as e:
   263→        logger.error(f"Quick contact handling failed: {e}\n{traceback.format_exc()}")
   264→        return False
   265→

   267→async def _detect_vip_paywall(page: Page) -> bool:
   268→    """Detect if a VIP/membership paywall is blocking the current page.
   269→
   270→    Non-VIP accounts may be redirected to a recharge/upgrade page when
   271→    trying to message certain candidates. This checks the page URL and
   272→    visible text for common paywall indicators.
   273→
   274→    Args:
   275→        page: Playwright page instance
   276→
   277→    Returns:
   278→        True if a VIP paywall is detected
   279→    """
   280→    try:
   281→        return await page.evaluate('''() => {
   282→            const url = window.location.href;
   283→            const urlKeywords = ['vip', 'member', 'pay', 'recharge', 'upgrade', 'subscribe'];
   284→            if (urlKeywords.some(kw => url.toLowerCase().includes(kw))) {
   285→                return true;
   286→            }
   287→
   288→            const title = document.title || '';
   289→            const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText.substring(0, 3000) : '';
   290→            const text = title + ' ' + bodyText;
   291→
   292→            const paywallPatterns = [
   293→                '开通会员', '升级会员', '会员专享', '会员权益',
   294→                '充值', '付费', '购买会员', '开通VIP', '升级VIP',
   295→                '立即开通', '立即升级', '立即购买',
   296→                '会员到期', '续费', '解锁', '次数已用完',
   297→                '今日沟通次数', '沟通人数已达上限',
   298→            ];
   299→
   300→            return paywallPatterns.some(p => text.includes(p));
   301→        }''')
   302→    except Exception as e:
   303→        logger.debug(f"VIP paywall detection failed: {e}")
   304→        return False
   305→

   307→async def send_message(
   308→    maimai_id: str,
   309→    template_name: str,
   310→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   311→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   312→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   313→    interactive: bool = False,
   314→    discovered_selectors: Optional['DiscoveredSelectors'] = None,
   315→    _skip_rate_check: bool = False,
   316→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None,
   317→) -> bool:
   318→    """
   319→    Send a message to a candidate.
   320→
   321→    Args:
   322→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   323→        template_name: Name of message template to use
   324→        variables: Variables to substitute in template
   325→        browser: Browser manager instance
   326→        skip_confirmation: Skip confirmation (only for testing)
   327→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery on failure
   328→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance for reuse
   329→
   330→    Returns:
   331→        True if message was sent successfully
   332→
   333→    Raises:
   334→        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   335→        ValidationError: If template or variables invalid
   336→    """
   337→    # Validate and clean inputs
   338→    maimai_id = validate_maimai_id(maimai_id)
   339→
   340→    if browser is None:
   341→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   342→
   343→    config = get_config()
   344→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   345→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   346→
   347→    # Get template
   348→    try:
   349→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
   350→    except Exception as e:
   351→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
   352→
   353→    # Validate template variables
   354→    validate_template_variables(template, variables)
   355→
   356→    # Render message content
   357→    content = render_template(template['content'], variables)
   358→
   359→    # Get candidate info for display
   360→    candidate_info = _get_candidate_info(db_manager, maimai_id)
   361→
   362→    # Preview and confirm
   363→    if not skip_confirmation:
   364→        action = await interactive_confirm(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   365→
   366→        if action == 'skip':
   367→            console.print("[yellow]Message skipped[/yellow]")
   368→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   369→            return False
   370→
   371→        elif action == 'edit':
   372→            # Allow user to edit content
   373→            content = await edit_message(content)
   374→            if content is None:
   375→                console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled[/yellow]")
   376→                return False
   377→
   378→            # Re-confirm after edit
   379→            action = await interactive_confirm(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   380→            if action != 'send':
   381→                console.print("[yellow]Message skipped[/yellow]")
   382→                return False
   383→
   384→        elif action != 'send':
   385→            console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled[/yellow]")
   386→            return False
   387→
   388→    # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval) - skip when called from batch
   389→    if not _skip_rate_check:
   390→        await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   391→
   392→    # Ensure logged in
   393→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   394→
   395→    try:
   396→        page = browser.page
   397→
   398→        # If we have populated discovered selectors, use them directly
   399→        if discovered_selectors and discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   400→            from src.modules.selector_discovery import apply_discovered_selectors
   401→            success = await apply_discovered_selectors(
   402→                page, maimai_id, discovered_selectors, content
   403→            )
   404→            if success:
   405→                rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   406→                    'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   407→                    'template': template_name
   408→                })
   409→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   410→                console.print("[green]Message sent successfully![/green]")
   411→                return True
   412→            else:
   413→                console.print("[red]Failed to send with discovered selectors[/red]")
   414→                await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   415→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   416→                return False
   417→
   418→        nav_ok = await _navigate_to_chat(
   419→            page, profile_url, config, browser, maimai_id,
   420→            interactive, discovered_selectors,
   421→        )
   422→        if not nav_ok:
   423→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   424→            return False
   425→
   426→        # Check for "等待回应" (Awaiting Response) — already messaged this candidate
   427→        try:
   428→            awaiting = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   429→                const text = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   430→                return text.includes('等待回应') || text.includes('等待对方回复');
   431→            }''')
   432→            if awaiting:
   433→                logger.info(f"Candidate {maimai_id} already messaged (awaiting response), skipping")
   434→                console.print(f"[yellow]Already messaged {maimai_id} (等待回应), skipping[/yellow]")
   435→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   436→                return False
   437→        except Exception:
   438→            pass
   439→
   440→        # Check for "极速联系" (Quick Contact) page
   441→        qc_result = await _handle_quick_contact(page, content)
   442→        if qc_result is True:
   443→            rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   444→                'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   445→                'template': template_name,
   446→                'mode': 'quick_contact',
   447→            })
   448→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   449→            console.print("[green]Message sent via Quick Contact![/green]")
   450→            return True
   451→        elif qc_result is False:
   452→            console.print("[red]Quick Contact page detected but send failed[/red]")
   453→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_qc_{maimai_id}")
   454→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   455→            return False
   456→        # qc_result is None → not a quick contact page, continue normal flow
   457→
   458→        # If interactive discovery succeeded, apply discovered selectors
   459→        if discovered_selectors and discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   460→            from src.modules.selector_discovery import apply_discovered_selectors
   461→            success = await apply_discovered_selectors(
   462→                page, maimai_id, discovered_selectors, content
   463→            )
   464→            if success:
   465→                rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   466→                    'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   467→                    'template': template_name
   468→                })
   469→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   470→                console.print("[green]Message sent successfully![/green]")
   471→                return True
   472→
   473→        # Check for existing conversation to avoid duplicate greetings
   474→        has_existing = await _check_existing_conversation(page, maimai_id)
   475→        if has_existing:
   476→            console.print(f"[yellow]Existing conversation detected with {maimai_id}. Skipping to avoid duplicate.[/yellow]")
   477→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   478→            return False
   479→
   480→        # Find message input and type message
   481→        input_found = await _type_message(page, config, content)
   482→        if not input_found:
   483→            console.print("[red]Could not find message input[/red]")
   484→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   485→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   486→            return False
   487→
   488→        await async_random_delay('action')
   489→
   490→        # Click send button
   491→        sent = await _click_send_button(page, config)
   492→        if not sent:
   493→            console.print("[red]Could not send message[/red]")
   494→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   495→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   496→            return False
   497→
   498→        # Check if clicking send triggered a VIP paywall popup
   499→        await asyncio.sleep(1)
   500→        if await _detect_vip_paywall(page):
   501→            console.print(f"[yellow]VIP paywall popup appeared after send for {maimai_id}, skipping[/yellow]")
   502→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   503→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"VIP paywall detected for {maimai_id}")
   504→
   505→        # Verify message was actually sent
   506→        verified = await _verify_message_sent(page, content)
   507→        if not verified:
   508→            logger.warning(f"Message to {maimai_id}: send button clicked but could not verify delivery")
   509→            console.print("[yellow]Warning: Message send could not be verified. Marking as unverified.[/yellow]")
   510→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_unverified_{maimai_id}")
   511→            # Still log as sent but with unverified note in details
   512→            rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   513→                'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   514→                'template': template_name,
   515→                'verified': False,
   516→            })
   517→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   518→            console.print("[yellow]Message marked as sent (unverified)[/yellow]")
   519→            return True
   520→
   521→        # Log action
   522→        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   523→            'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   524→            'template': template_name,
   525→            'verified': True,
   526→        })
   527→
   528→        # Log message to database
   529→        _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   530→
   531→        console.print("[green]Message sent and verified![/green]")
   532→        return True
   533→
   534→    except PermanentFailureError:
   535→        raise
   536→    except Exception as e:
   537→        logger.error(f"Error sending message: {e}")
   538→        await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   539→        _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   540→        raise

   543→async def send_message_batch(
   544→    candidates: List[dict],
   545→    template_name: str,
   546→    common_variables: Dict[str, str],
   547→    browser: BrowserManager,
   548→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   549→    interactive: bool = False,
   550→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   551→    """
   552→    Batch send messages to a list of candidates.
   553→
   554→    Flow:
   555→    1. Filter already-messaged candidates
   556→    2. Auto-fill name/company/position variables per candidate
   557→    3. Render message template
   558→    4. Show candidate list + first message preview
   559→    5. Single confirmation
   560→    6. Send one by one, checking rate limit each time
   561→    7. Skip failures and record
   562→    8. Return result stats
   563→
   564→    Args:
   565→        candidates: List of dicts with maimai_id, name, company, title
   566→        template_name: Name of message template
   567→        common_variables: Shared variables (recruiter_name, target_position, etc.)
   568→        browser: Browser manager instance
   569→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged (default True)
   570→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery on first failure
   571→
   572→    Returns:
   573→        Dict with total, sent, failed, skipped, rate_limited, details
   574→    """
   575→    config = get_config()
   576→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   577→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   578→
   579→    # Get template
   580→    try:
   581→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
   582→    except Exception:
   583→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
   584→
   585→    # Create shared discovered selectors for interactive mode
   586→    if interactive:
   587→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import DiscoveredSelectors
   588→        discovered_selectors = DiscoveredSelectors()
   589→    else:
   590→        discovered_selectors = None
   591→
   592→    results = {
   593→        'total': len(candidates),
   594→        'sent': 0,
   595→        'failed': 0,
   596→        'skipped': 0,
   597→        'rate_limited': 0,
   598→        'details': [],
   599→    }
   600→
   601→    # Filter already-messaged candidates
   602→    send_list = []
   603→    if skip_messaged:
   604→        # Batch pre-fetch all sent message IDs to avoid N+1 queries
   605→        all_ids = [c['maimai_id'] for c in candidates]
   606→        messaged_ids = set()
   607→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   608→            rows = session.query(Message.candidate_maimai_id).filter(
   609→                Message.candidate_maimai_id.in_(all_ids),
   610→                Message.status == 'sent'
   611→            ).distinct().all()
   612→            messaged_ids = {row[0] for row in rows}
   613→
   614→        for c in candidates:
   615→            if c['maimai_id'] in messaged_ids:
   616→                results['skipped'] += 1
   617→                results['details'].append({
   618→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   619→                    'name': c['name'],
   620→                    'status': 'skipped',
   621→                    'reason': 'already messaged',
   622→                })
   623→            else:
   624→                send_list.append(c)
   625→    else:
   626→        send_list = list(candidates)
   627→
   628→    if not send_list:
   629→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]")
   630→        return results
   631→
   632→    # Build preview for first candidate
   633→    first = send_list[0]
   634→    first_vars = {**common_variables, 'name': first['name'], 'company': first['company'], 'position': first['title']}
   635→    first_content = render_template(template['content'], first_vars)
   636→
   637→    # Display summary panel
   638→    summary_text = Text()
   639→    summary_text.append("Template: ", style="bold")
   640→    summary_text.append(f"{template_name}\n")
   641→    summary_text.append("Candidates: ", style="bold")
   642→    summary_text.append(f"{len(candidates)} found, {results['skipped']} already messaged\n")
   643→    summary_text.append("Will send to: ", style="bold")
   644→    summary_text.append(f"{len(send_list)} candidates\n\n")
   645→    summary_text.append("Message Preview ", style="bold cyan")
   646→    summary_text.append(f"(first candidate):\n", style="dim")
   647→    summary_text.append("To: ", style="bold cyan")
   648→    recipient = first['name']
   649→    if first.get('title') and first.get('company'):
   650→        recipient += f" ({first['title']} @ {first['company']})"
   651→    summary_text.append(f"{recipient}\n\n")
   652→    summary_text.append(first_content)
   653→
   654→    console.print(Panel(
   655→        summary_text,
   656→        title="Pipeline Summary",
   657→        border_style="green",
   658→        padding=(1, 2)
   659→    ))
   660→
   661→    # Single confirmation (run in executor to avoid nested event loop)
   662→    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   663→    confirm = await loop.run_in_executor(
   664→        None,
   665→        lambda: questionary.confirm(
   666→            f"Confirm batch send to {len(send_list)} candidates?"
   667→        ).unsafe_ask()
   668→    )
   669→
   670→    if not confirm:
   671→        console.print("[yellow]Batch send cancelled.[/yellow]")
   672→        return results
   673→
   674→    # Send messages one by one
   675→    from rich.progress import Progress, BarColumn, TextColumn as ProgressTextColumn, MofNCompleteColumn
   676→
   677→    with Progress(
   678→        ProgressTextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   679→        BarColumn(),
   680→        MofNCompleteColumn(),
   681→        console=console
   682→    ) as progress:
   683→        task = progress.add_task("Sending messages...", total=len(send_list))
   684→
   685→        max_retries = 2
   686→        rate_limit_hit = False
   687→
   688→        for c in send_list:
   689→            if rate_limit_hit:
   690→                break
   691→
   692→            # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   693→            try:
   694→                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   695→            except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   696→                console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
   697→                remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])
   698→                results['rate_limited'] = remaining
   699→                results['details'].append({
   700→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   701→                    'name': c['name'],
   702→                    'status': 'rate_limited',
   703→                    'reason': str(e),
   704→                })
   705→                break
   706→
   707→            # Build per-candidate variables
   708→            variables = {
   709→                **common_variables,
   710→                'name': c['name'],
   711→                'company': c['company'],
   712→                'position': c['title'],
   713→            }
   714→            content = render_template(template['content'], variables)
   715→
   716→            # Retry loop for transient failures
   717→            sent = False
   718→            last_error = None
   719→            per_candidate_timeout = 90  # seconds per candidate
   720→            for attempt in range(1 + max_retries):
   721→                try:
   722→                    success = await asyncio.wait_for(
   723→                        send_message(
   724→                            maimai_id=c['maimai_id'],
   725→                            template_name=template_name,
   726→                            variables=variables,
   727→                            browser=browser,
   728→                            skip_confirmation=True,
   729→                            interactive=interactive,
   730→                            discovered_selectors=discovered_selectors,
   731→                            _skip_rate_check=True,
   732→                            profile_url=c.get('profile_url'),
   733→                        ),
   734→                        timeout=per_candidate_timeout,
   735→                    )
   736→
   737→                    if success:
   738→                        results['sent'] += 1
   739→                        results['details'].append({
   740→                            'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   741→                            'name': c['name'],
   742→                            'status': 'sent',
   743→                            'attempts': attempt + 1,
   744→                        })
   745→                        sent = True
   746→                        break
   747→                    else:
   748→                        last_error = "send returned False"
   749→
   750→                except asyncio.TimeoutError:
   751→                    last_error = f"Timed out after {per_candidate_timeout}s"
   752→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Timeout for {c['name']} ({c['maimai_id']}), skipping.[/yellow]")
   753→                    break
   754→                except PermanentFailureError as e:
   755→                    last_error = str(e)
   756→                    console.print(f"[yellow]{e}. Skipping.[/yellow]")
   757→                    break
   758→                except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   759→                    remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])
   760→                    results['rate_limited'] = remaining
   761→                    results['details'].append({
   762→                        'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   763→                        'name': c['name'],
   764→                        'status': 'rate_limited',
   765→                        'reason': str(e),
   766→                    })
   767→                    console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
   768→                    rate_limit_hit = True
   769→                    break
   770→                except Exception as e:
   771→                    last_error = str(e)
   772→
   773→                # Retry with exponential backoff if not last attempt
   774→                if attempt < max_retries and not rate_limit_hit:
   775→                    from src.utils.delays import get_retry_delay
   776→                    delay = get_retry_delay(attempt, base_delay=3.0, max_delay=30.0)
   777→                    logger.info(f"Retry {attempt + 1}/{max_retries} for {c['name']} in {delay:.1f}s")
   778→                    await asyncio.sleep(delay)
   779→
   780→            if not sent and not rate_limit_hit:
   781→                actual_attempts = attempt + 1
   782→                results['failed'] += 1
   783→                results['details'].append({
   784→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   785→                    'name': c['name'],
   786→                    'status': 'failed',
   787→                    'reason': last_error,
   788→                    'attempts': actual_attempts,
   789→                })
   790→                logger.error(f"Failed to send message to {c['name']} after {actual_attempts} attempt(s): {last_error}")
   791→
   792→            progress.advance(task)
   793→
   794→            # Human-like delay between messages
   795→            await async_random_delay('message')
   796→
   797→    return results
   798→
   799→
   800→def render_template(template_content: str, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
   801→    """
   802→    Render template with variables.
   803→
   804→    Maimai chat is plain text, so values are substituted as-is without
   805→    HTML escaping (which would produce visible & entities in chat).
   806→
   807→    Args:
   808→        template_content: Template string with {variable} placeholders
   809→        variables: Variable values to substitute
   810→
   811→    Returns:
   812→        Rendered message content
   813→    """
   814→    content = template_content
   815→    for key, value in variables.items():
   816→        content = content.replace(f"{{{key}}}", str(value))
   817→    return content
   818→

   820→def preview_message(

   825→    """

   828→    Args:

   831→        candidate_info: Optional candidate info for context
   832→

   835→    """
   836→    config = get_config()

   839→
   840→    # Display preview

   843→    return content

   846→def display_message_preview(
   847→    content: str,

   850→) -> None:
   851→    """

   859→    # Build recipient line

   863→            recipient += f" ({candidate_info['title']} @ {candidate_info['company']})"
   864→    else:
   865→        recipient = "Unknown recipient"

   872→    panel_content = Text()

   875→    panel_content.append(content)

   877→    console.print(Panel(

   879→        title=title,
   880→        border_style="cyan",

   885→async def interactive_confirm(
   886→    content: str,
   887→    candidate_info: Optional[Dict] = None,
   888→    template_name: Optional[str] = None
   889→) -> str:
   890→    """
   891→    Show interactive confirmation dialog.
   892→
   893→    Args:
   894→        content: Message content to confirm
   895→        candidate_info: Optional candidate info
   896→        template_name: Optional template name
   897→
   898→    Returns:
   899→        Action string: 'send', 'edit', or 'skip'
   900→    """
   901→    # Display preview
   902→    display_message_preview(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   903→
   904→    console.print()
   905→
   906→    # Interactive prompt
   907→    choices = [
   908→        questionary.Choice("Send message", value="send"),
   909→        questionary.Choice("Edit content", value="edit"),
   910→        questionary.Choice("Skip (don't send)", value="skip"),
   911→    ]
   912→
   913→    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   914→    action = await loop.run_in_executor(
   915→        None,
   916→        lambda: questionary.select(
   917→            "What would you like to do?",
   918→            choices=choices,
   919→            style=questionary.Style([
   920→                ('selected', 'fg:green bold'),
   921→                ('pointer', 'fg:green bold'),
   922→                ('highlighted', 'fg:green'),
   923→            ])
   924→        ).unsafe_ask()
   925→    )
   926→
   927→    return action or 'skip'
   928→

   930→async def edit_message(content: str) -> Optional[str]:
   931→    """
   932→    Allow user to edit message content.
   933→
   934→    Args:
   935→        content: Original content
   936→
   937→    Returns:
   938→        Edited content or None if cancelled
   939→    """
   940→    console.print("\n[dim]Enter new message content (Ctrl+D to finish, Ctrl+C to cancel):[/dim]")
   941→
   942→    try:
   943→        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   944→        edited = await loop.run_in_executor(
   945→            None,
   946→            lambda: questionary.text(
   947→                "Message:",
   948→                default=content,
   949→                multiline=True
   950→            ).unsafe_ask()
   951→        )
   952→
   953→        return edited
   954→    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   955→        return None

   958→async def _find_element_by_selectors(page: Page, selectors: List[str], timeout: int = 3000):
   959→    """Try multiple selectors and return the first matching element.
   960→
   961→    Args:
   962→        page: Playwright page instance
   963→        selectors: List of CSS selectors to try in order
   964→        timeout: Timeout per selector in ms
   965→
   966→    Returns:
   967→        Tuple of (element, selector) or (None, None) if not found
   968→    """
   969→    for selector in selectors:
   970→        try:
   971→            elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=timeout)
   972→            if elem:
   973→                return elem, selector
   974→        except Exception:
   975→            continue
   976→    return None, None
   977→

   979→async def _click_chat_button(page: Page, config) -> bool:
   980→    """Find and click chat/message button, then wait for navigation to chat page."""
   981→    selectors = [
   982→        config.get_selector('message.chat_button'),
   983→        'button[class*="chat"]',
   984→        '[class*="message-btn"]',
   985→        'button:has-text("极速联系")',
   986→        'button:has-text("立即沟通")',
   987→        'button:has-text("发消息")',
   988→        'button:has-text("私信")',
   989→        'button:has-text("聊天")',
   990→    ]
   991→
   992→    url_before = page.url
   993→
   994→    for selector in selectors:
   995→        try:
   996→            button = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
   997→            if button:
   998→                await human_click(page, selector)
   999→                logger.debug(f"Clicked chat button: {selector}")
  1000→
  1001→                # Wait for navigation or page change after clicking
  1002→                try:
  1003→                    # Wait for URL change (chat page transition) or new content load
  1004→                    await page.wait_for_url(
  1005→                        lambda url: url != url_before,
  1006→                        timeout=8000,
  1007→                    )
  1008→                    logger.debug(f"Page navigated to: {page.url}")
  1009→                except Exception:
  1010→                    # URL may not change if chat opens as overlay/modal
  1011→                    logger.debug("URL did not change after chat button click, checking for chat panel")
  1012→
  1013→                # Wait for chat-related elements to appear (input or conversation area)
  1014→                chat_ready_selectors = [
  1015→                    'textarea', '[contenteditable="true"]',
  1016→                    '[class*="chat-container"]', '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1017→                    '[class*="message-list"]', '[class*="im-message"]',
  1018→                ]
  1019→                for chat_sel in chat_ready_selectors:
  1020→                    try:
  1021→                        await page.wait_for_selector(chat_sel, timeout=5000)
  1022→                        logger.debug(f"Chat page ready, found: {chat_sel}")
  1023→                        return True
  1024→                    except Exception:
  1025→                        continue
  1026→
  1027→                # If we got here, button was clicked but no chat UI detected
  1028→                # Still return True since the button was found and clicked
  1029→                logger.warning("Chat button clicked but chat UI not detected")
  1030→                return True
  1031→        except Exception:
  1032→            continue
  1033→
  1034→    logger.warning("Chat button not found")
  1035→    return False
  1036→

  1038→async def _type_message(page: Page, config, content: str) -> bool:
  1039→    """Find message input and type content.
  1040→
  1041→    Uses progressively broader selectors. Broad selectors (bare textarea,
  1042→    contenteditable) are only tried when the current URL looks like a chat page
  1043→    to avoid typing into unrelated inputs (e.g. search bars on profile pages).
  1044→    """
  1045→    # Chat-specific selectors (always safe to try)
  1046→    chat_selectors = [
  1047→        config.get_selector('message.message_input'),
  1048→        'textarea[class*="chat"]',
  1049→        'textarea[class*="message"]',
  1050→        'textarea[class*="im-"]',
  1051→        '[class*="chat"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1052→        '[class*="im-"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1053→        '[class*="message"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1054→    ]
  1055→
  1056→    for selector in chat_selectors:
  1057→        try:
  1058→            input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1059→            if input_elem:
  1060→                await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1061→                logger.debug(f"Typed message in: {selector}")
  1062→                return True
  1063→        except Exception as e:
  1064→            logger.debug(f"Chat selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1065→            continue
  1066→
  1067→    # Broad selectors — only try if URL suggests we're on a chat page
  1068→    current_url = page.url
  1069→    is_chat_page = any(kw in current_url for kw in ('chat', 'im/', 'uh_chat', 'message'))
  1070→
  1071→    if is_chat_page:
  1072→        broad_selectors = [
  1073→            '[contenteditable="true"]',
  1074→            'textarea',
  1075→        ]
  1076→        for selector in broad_selectors:
  1077→            try:
  1078→                input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1079→                if input_elem:
  1080→                    await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1081→                    logger.debug(f"Typed message in (broad, chat URL): {selector}")
  1082→                    return True
  1083→            except Exception as e:
  1084→                logger.debug(f"Broad selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1085→                continue
  1086→
  1087→    logger.warning(f"Message input not found (is_chat_page={is_chat_page}, url={current_url})")
  1088→    return False
  1089→
  1090→
  1091→async def _click_send_button(page: Page, config) -> bool:
  1092→    """Find and click send button."""
  1093→    selectors = [
  1094→        config.get_selector('message.send_button'),
  1095→        'button[class*="send"]',
  1096→        'button:has-text("提交")',
  1097→        'button:has-text("发送")',

  1101→
  1102→    button, selector = await _find_element_by_selectors(page, selectors)

  1105→        logger.debug(f"Clicked send button: {selector}")
  1106→        await async_random_delay('action')
  1107→        return True
  1108→
  1109→    logger.warning("Send button not found")

  1113→async def _verify_message_sent(page: Page, content: str, timeout: int = 5000) -> bool:
  1114→    """
  1115→    Verify that a message was actually sent by checking the conversation area.
  1116→
  1117→    Polls up to `timeout` ms with short intervals to handle async rendering.
  1118→
  1119→    Checks for:
  1120→    1. The sent message content appearing in the conversation
  1121→    2. The message input being cleared (indicating successful send)
  1122→    3. A sent/delivered indicator element
  1123→
  1124→    Args:
  1125→        page: Playwright page instance
  1126→        content: The message content that was sent
  1127→        timeout: Max time to wait for verification in ms
  1128→
  1129→    Returns:
  1130→        True if message send was verified
  1131→    """
  1132→    import time
  1133→
  1134→    # Short snippet for matching (first 20 chars, avoid template artifacts)
  1135→    snippet = content[:20].strip()
  1136→
  1137→    poll_interval_ms = 500
  1138→    deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout / 1000.0
  1139→
  1140→    while True:
  1141→        try:
  1142→            # Strategy 1: Check if message content appears in conversation area
  1143→            verified = await page.evaluate('''(snippet) => {
  1144→                const chatSelectors = [
  1145→                    '[class*="message-list"]',
  1146→                    '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1147→                    '[class*="conversation"]',
  1148→                    '[class*="msg-list"]',
  1149→                    '[class*="im-message"]',
  1150→                    '[class*="chat-msg"]',
  1151→                ];
  1152→
  1153→                for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
  1154→                    const container = document.querySelector(sel);
  1155→                    if (container && container.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
  1156→                        return true;
  1157→                    }
  1158→                }
  1159→
  1160→                // Fallback: scan leaf-ish elements in the lower portion of the page
  1161→                const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
  1162→                const elements = document.querySelectorAll('div, p, span');
  1163→                for (const el of elements) {
  1164→                    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
  1165→                    if (rect.top > viewportHeight * 0.3 && el.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
  1166→                        if (el.textContent.length < snippet.length + 200) {
  1167→                            return true;
  1168→                        }
  1169→                    }
  1170→                }
  1171→
  1172→                return false;
  1173→            }''', snippet)
  1174→
  1175→            if verified:
  1176→                logger.debug("Message send verified: content found in conversation")
  1177→                return True
  1178→
  1179→            # Strategy 2: Check if input was cleared (indicates successful send)
  1180→            input_cleared = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1181→                const inputs = document.querySelectorAll(
  1182→                    'textarea, [contenteditable="true"], input[type="text"]'
  1183→                );
  1184→                for (const input of inputs) {
  1185→                    const rect = input.getBoundingClientRect();
  1186→                    if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) {
  1187→                        const value = input.value || input.textContent || '';
  1188→                        if (value.trim() === '') {
  1189→                            return true;
  1190→                        }
  1191→                    }
  1192→                }
  1193→                return false;
  1194→            }''')
  1195→
  1196→            if input_cleared:
  1197→                logger.debug("Message send verified: input field was cleared")
  1198→                return True
  1199→
  1200→            # Strategy 3: Check for sent/delivered indicators
  1201→            sent_indicators = [
  1202→                '[class*="sent"]',
  1203→                '[class*="delivered"]',
  1204→                '[class*="success"]',
  1205→                '[class*="msg-status"]',
  1206→            ]
  1207→            for selector in sent_indicators:
  1208→                try:
  1209→                    indicator = await page.query_selector(selector)
  1210→                    if indicator and await indicator.is_visible():
  1211→                        logger.debug(f"Message send verified: indicator found ({selector})")
  1212→                        return True
  1213→                except Exception:
  1214→                    continue
  1215→
  1216→        except Exception as e:
  1217→            logger.warning(f"Message verification poll failed: {e}")
  1218→
  1219→        # Check if we've exceeded the deadline
  1220→        if time.monotonic() >= deadline:
  1221→            break
  1222→
  1223→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_ms / 1000.0)
  1224→
  1225→    logger.warning("Could not verify message was sent after polling")
  1226→    return False
  1227→
  1228→
  1229→async def _check_existing_conversation(page: Page, maimai_id: str) -> bool:
  1230→    """
  1231→    Check if there's already an existing conversation with this candidate.
  1232→
  1233→    Checks for actual user message bubbles (not system prompts/tips) in the
  1234→    conversation area.
  1235→
  1236→    Args:
  1237→        page: Playwright page instance
  1238→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
  1239→
  1240→    Returns:
  1241→        True if an existing conversation was detected
  1242→    """
  1243→    try:
  1244→        has_conversation = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1245→            // Look for conversation message containers
  1246→            const chatSelectors = [
  1247→                '[class*="message-list"]',
  1248→                '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1249→                '[class*="conversation"]',
  1250→                '[class*="msg-list"]',
  1251→                '[class*="im-message"]',
  1252→                '[class*="chat-msg"]',
  1253→                '[class*="chat-record"]',
  1254→            ];
  1255→
  1256→            // System/tip patterns that should NOT count as existing conversation
  1257→            const systemPatterns = [
  1258→                '还不是好友', '添加好友', '发送好友申请', '对方未回复',
  1259→                '以上是打招呼内容', '暂无消息', '开始聊天', '你们已经是好友',
  1260→                '系统消息', '温馨提示', '安全提示', '注意事项',
  1261→                '开启招呼语', '求职意向', '目前情况', '竞业点',
  1262→                '欢迎联系', '不感兴趣',
  1263→            ];
  1264→
  1265→            const isSystemText = (text) => {
  1266→                const t = text.trim();
  1267→                if (t.length < 5) return true;  // Too short to be a real message
  1268→                return systemPatterns.some(p => t.includes(p));
  1269→            };
  1270→
  1271→            for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
  1272→                const container = document.querySelector(sel);
  1273→                if (!container) continue;
  1274→
  1275→                // Strategy 1: Look for message bubble elements
  1276→                const bubbleSelectors = [
  1277→                    '[class*="msg-item"]', '[class*="message-item"]',
  1278→                    '[class*="bubble"]', '[class*="chat-item"]',
  1279→                    '[class*="msg-bubble"]', '[class*="chat-bubble"]',
  1280→                ];
  1281→                for (const bSel of bubbleSelectors) {
  1282→                    const bubbles = container.querySelectorAll(bSel);
  1283→                    // Filter out system/tip bubbles
  1284→                    let realMessageCount = 0;
  1285→                    for (const bubble of bubbles) {
  1286→                        const text = bubble.textContent.trim();
  1287→                        if (text.length > 5 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1288→                            realMessageCount++;
  1289→                        }
  1290→                    }
  1291→                    if (realMessageCount > 0) {
  1292→                        return true;
  1293→                    }
  1294→                }
  1295→
  1296→                // Strategy 2: If no bubble selectors matched, check direct children
  1297→                // that look like message blocks (not system tips)
  1298→                const children = container.children;
  1299→                let realChildCount = 0;
  1300→                for (const child of children) {
  1301→                    const text = child.textContent.trim();
  1302→                    // Must have meaningful content and not be a system message
  1303→                    if (text.length > 10 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1304→                        // Check it's not a timestamp-only or status-only element
  1305→                        if (child.querySelector('img[class*="avatar"]') || text.length > 20) {
  1306→                            realChildCount++;
  1307→                        }
  1308→                    }
  1309→                }
  1310→                if (realChildCount > 0) {
  1311→                    return true;
  1312→                }
  1313→            }
  1314→            return false;
  1315→        }''')
  1316→
  1317→        if has_conversation:
  1318→            logger.info(f"Existing conversation detected for {maimai_id}")
  1319→        return has_conversation
  1320→
  1321→    except Exception as e:
  1322→        # On error, assume conversation exists (safe side: avoid duplicate messages)
  1323→        logger.warning(f"Conversation check failed for {maimai_id}: {e} — assuming existing conversation")
  1324→        return True
  1325→
  1326→
  1327→def _get_candidate_info(db_manager, maimai_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
  1328→    """Get candidate info from database."""
  1329→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1330→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1331→        if candidate:
  1332→            return {
  1333→                'name': candidate.name,
  1334→                'title': candidate.title,
  1335→                'company': candidate.company,
  1336→            }
  1337→        return None
  1338→
  1339→
  1340→def _log_message(
  1341→    db_manager,
  1342→    maimai_id: str,
  1343→    template_name: str,
  1344→    content: str,
  1345→    status: str
  1346→) -> None:
  1347→    """Log message to database. Creates a minimal Candidate if needed for FK."""
  1348→    try:
  1349→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1350→            # Ensure candidate exists for FK constraint
  1351→            existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1352→            if not existing:
  1353→                session.add(Candidate(maimai_id=maimai_id))
  1354→                session.flush()
  1355→
  1356→            message = Message(
  1357→                candidate_maimai_id=maimai_id,
  1358→                template_name=template_name,
  1359→                content=content,
  1360→                status=status,
  1361→                sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None
  1362→            )
  1363→            session.add(message)
  1364→            logger.debug(f"Logged message to {maimai_id}: {status}")
  1365→    except Exception as e:
  1366→        logger.warning(
  1367→            f"AUDIT FAILURE: Failed to log message to {maimai_id} (status={status}): {e}. "
  1368→            f"This candidate may be re-messaged on next run."
  1369→        )
  1370→
